movie.actors: Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes, Sandra Bullock, Nigel Hawthorne
movie.plot: A police officer is brought out of suspended animation in prison to pursue an old ultra-violent nemesis who is loose in a non-violent future society.
movie.title: Demolition Man
movie.writer: Peter M. Lenkov (story), Robert Reneau (story), Daniel Waters (screenplay), Robert Reneau (screenplay), Peter M. Lenkov (screenplay)
